This compact catalog treats skill bundles as Hermes-style task profiles over existing reviewed skills. It reports procedural-memory orchestration metadata, selected/load state, skill-ref resolution, instruction hashes, risk rollups, and gates only; raw bundle YAML, bundle instructions, skill bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, credentials, and secret values are not included.

### Bundle Catalog Entries

### Catalog Gates

- skill_ref_gate=`pass`
- instruction_body_gate=`sha256_12`
- external_registry_gate=`not_configured`
- installer_gate=`disabled`
- agent_authored_mutation_gate=`disabled`
- raw_body_gate=`hash_only`
